emails.subject: Re: ISDA Notebooks
emails.body: Re: ISDA Notebooks I would like 4. Thanks. Sara Taffy Milligan 09/07/2000 11:02 AM

emails.subject: Re: ISDA Notebooks
emails.body: Good morning, Sara. I have recieved the ISDA Notebooks from the printers. I will be happy to distribute the four sets that you requested. Please provide name, address, etc. The ISDA Notebooks now consist of 3 volumes. The definitions have been split into two binders. Would you like me to update your binder? tm Sara Shackleton 09/07/2000 11:27 AM

emails.subject: Re: ISDA Notebooks
emails.body: one for me Jeff Blumenthal tax Steve Douglas tax Ryan Siurek accounting (Global Finance) Taffy Milligan 09/21/2000 07:35 AM
